label: About
title: About Soil Halo Listening Forge
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 17 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around THE MINI FOREST - Rewilding using the Miyawaki Method and Join the Less Lawn More Life Challenge, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Soil Halo Listening Forge: Create one finished still image of a rewilded listening forge, artwork first and software second: a dense but breathable habitat world organized around a single monumental, near-central halo structure with an oval void, crisp bilateral authority, and intricate layered surfaces. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central oval ring, lower portal growth bed, and upper black disc.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
